title: selaginella longipinna
intro: Selaginella longipinna, also known as the spiny club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella longipinna include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella longipinna can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
